author: berkevnl (Efe Berke Ağlık)
description: A robust CLI student management and performance tracking tool with persistent storage and defensive programming.

add.description: Adds a new student with a unique ID.

errors.duplicate_id: Error: Student with ID <id> already exists.
errors.non_numeric: Invalid input: Please enter a numeric value.

add-grade.description: Appends a grade to an existing student's record.

errors.not_found: Error: No student found with ID <id>.
errors.out_of_range: Invalid grade: Grades must be between 0 and 100.
errors.non_numeric: Invalid input: Please enter a numeric value.

del-grade.description: Removes a specific grade from a student's record.

errors.not_found: Error: No student found with ID <id>.
errors.grade_not_found: Error: Grade <target_grade> not found for this student.
errors.non_numeric: Invalid input: Please enter a numeric value.

calc-avg.description: Calculates and displays the average of a student's grades.

errors.not_found: Error: No student found with ID <id>.
errors.calc_fail: Error: Could not calculate average for student <id>.

delete.description: Deletes a student and all associated data.
delete.success_msg: Student and all grades deleted successfully.

errors.not_found: Error: No student found with ID <id>.

list.description: Displays all students and their detailed data.

errors.empty: Error: No students found in the system. Operation aborted.
Error: No data available to generate a report.

global_errors.unknown_command: Unknown command: <command>. Please select from the menu.
global_errors.not_initialized: Not initialized. Run: python solution.py init

benchmarking_notes.float_precision: Average should be displayed with 2 decimal places.
